title: From the Rector
content:
From the Rector

Dear Students,

Istanbul Esenyurt University is a dynamic university that attaches importance to quality in education since its establishment in 2013 and reflects its innovative understanding to its vision by adhering to its basic principles. We are aware that in such a fast and dynamic era, education cannot be fit into traditional frameworks. This awareness, which we have strengthened with our student-oriented understanding, ensures that the education at our university is provided using the latest technologies.

IESU has aimed to be able to proudly carry its students to the bright future and our country to the level of modern societies by starting with the slogan ’Your Priority in Education‘ and continuing with the slogan ’Give direction to your future'. Our university continues its activities with its strong academic staff accompanied by the guidance of science and technology with its innovative and sustainable educational understanding in this educational journey.

Our university student-focused educational approach, the country the aim of the service and science has in society have contributed to the spread of Science and technological development, and the needs of the stakeholders in the area of knowledgeable, equipped, entrepreneurial spirit, and strong social skills that can create a difference in personality, has undertaken a mission to educate individuals with social responsibility.

Dear Students,

By choosing our university to guide your future, you have had the chance to experience all the advantages of studying at a young and dynamic university. With a qualified academic staff, departments and programs that meet the needs of the age and our country, we are experiencing the happiness of bringing our young people who can take up different positions in the business, health, engineering and social life of our country to our country within the Istanbul Esenyurt University family. I wish that this new academic year will bring health, happiness and success to all of us.

With love and Respect;

Prof. Dr. Süleyman ÖZDEMİR

Rector

This content was updated on 08/04/2025.
